title: dalea phleoides var. microphylla
intro: Dalea phleoides var. microphylla, also known as prairie rose, is a flowering plant native to North America. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Dalea phleoides var. microphylla include infusions, teas, and topical creams, which can be used to address various health concerns.
